configuration.sifli.title: SiFli Extension Configuration
configuration.sifli.embeddedPythonPath.d: Path to the embedded Python directory. If set, the extension will use this Python environment.
configuration.sifli.useEmbeddedPython.de: Whether to use the embedded Python environment provided by SiFli (Windows only).
configuration.sifli.sdkConfigs.descripti: List of installed SiFli SDK configurations. Each entry contains path and optional toolchain path.
configuration.sifli.customBoardSearchPat: Optional: Absolute or relative path to a directory containing custom SiFli board configurations. (e.g., C:\MyBoards or ../my_boards)
configuration.sifli.workflows.descriptio: Workflow definitions. Use workspace settings for team sharing; user-level entries with the same id override workspace entries.
configuration.sifli.statusBar.buttons.de: Status bar button definitions for workflows/commands. Use existing ids (compile/rebuild/clean/download/menuconfig/deviceMonitor) to override default buttons.
configuration.probeRs.title: SiFli probe-rs Debugger
configuration.probeRs.debuggerExecutable:
Path to the `probe-rs` executable. If unset, the extension expects `probe-rs` (or `probe-rs.exe`) to be available on the system PATH.

Note: Setting `runtimeExecutable` in 'launch.json' overrides this setting.
debugger.probeRs.label: SiFli probe-rs Debugger
